title: "Immerse in the Rich Traditions of Korean New Year, Seollal!"
description: "Seollal, the Korean New Year, is a significant traditional holiday celebrated for three days around the second new moon after winter solstice. It's a time for family gatherings, ancestral respect, renewal, and traditional customs like charye (ancestral ritual), Sebae (respectful bow to elders), and games like Yut Nori."
